artStyle: Clean photorealistic renders with sharp focus and modern aesthetics. Emphasis on clarity, scale, and data-driven visual metaphors. Crisp detail, high contrast, slightly desaturated color grading with selective color pops on key subjects.
lighting: Bright, even studio-style lighting with subtle gradient backgrounds. Clean white or cool-toned ambient light. Minimal shadows for maximum clarity. Occasional dramatic backlighting for emphasis on key subjects.
compositionRules: Single-subject centered compositions with generous negative space. Clean framing, no visual clutter. Subject occupies 60-70% of frame. Strong vertical alignment for mobile viewing. Infographic-style layouts for data scenes.
culturalMarkers: Modern, globally recognizable settings and technology. Clean contemporary environments. Context-appropriate details that match the topic's geography and era.
antiArtifactGuidance: Sharp edges and clean lines. No blur or softness unless intentional depth-of-field. Accurate proportions on all subjects. Text-free renders. Consistent color temperature across all scenes. High-resolution detail on key subjects.
